series_metadata.series_description: Electric utility regional report to the PUCO. Also includes reports filed by major electric companies for 5-10-20 year electric forecasts.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain permanently. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and image has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until system is determined obsolete, then transfer to new system., Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other
